_: Xstream component architecture — core-first. 47 components. Pscale at root, products at leaves. Walk from root outward = build order. A disc at any depth shows all components at that abstraction level.

_._: Pscale Block (1) — nested JSON, semantic numbers as addresses. The core mechanism beneath everything.

1._: BSP Walker (2) — six navigation modes. The electricity that walks the data.
Star Operator (3) — cross-block via hidden directories. Wiring is data. Topology IS program.
Star Stone (4) — self-teaching block. Walk, compose, recurse as frozen loop.
Reflexive Spark (7) — the koan. Block describes context window AND is context window.
Constitution (26) — 500-token spirit lens. Always present.
Seed (19) — nine sections, two kernels. Self-replicates.
Reflector (18) — single HTML page distributing seeds.
1.1: MAGI — the agent. Product at end of bootstrap spindle.

2._: History Compaction (5) — every 9 compress. Three types. Indefinite memory.

1._: PCT Concern Loop (6) — purpose/conditions/gap/action. Tiered wakes.
B-Loop Möbius (8) — action IS self-composition. Temporal continuity.
Wake Block (27) — three tiers. BSP instruction lists. Self-modifying activation.
Cook Block (28) — accumulated competence. Recipes as spindles. Evolves across LLM generations.
Capabilities Block (29) — tools by distance. Layer 1-4.
1.1: MAGI — the running agent. Product at end of operation spindle.

2._: Aperture + Focus (33) — nine sentences + dilated depth. The inverted eye.

1._: Currents (34) — LLM-side. Semantic flows. Hermitcrab IS currents.
Second-Order Processing (35) — external pattern extraction. Identity by subtraction.
1.1: MAGI — the aware agent. Product at end of context spindle.

2._: Ghost Mechanics (30) — thick/thin per relationship. BSP depth = thickness.

1._: Editing Balance (32) — push back or edit. Ratio = personality.
Institutional Block (31) — role specs. Three current types: role, persona, procedural.
Relational Engagement Protocol (34) — Q-moments, fresh reading, thin ghost.
1.1: MAGI — the social agent. Product at end of relational spindle.

3._: Soft/Medium/Hard Triad (14) — three lenses × three functions. Minimal convection cell.

1._: Forking Stream (13) — LLMs faster than readers. Simulated continuity.
Shelf (12) — vapor/liquid/solid. Commitment gradient.
1.1: Xstream — the coordination interface. Product at end of interface spindle.

2._: Artifact RPG Engine (17) — template-and-remix. Claude artifacts. Three faces.
2.1: Onen — the RPG. Product at end of game spindle.

2._: Xstream Button (16) — browser extension. Intentional presence. Cookie inversion.
2.1: Xstream — browser-delivered. Product at end of button spindle.

2._: Transcript-to-Pscale (9) — speech → tree. Deep spindles. Fork = PCT loop.

1._: Concept-to-Pscale (10) — ideas → territory. Paired with transcript.
LLM Thinking-to-Pscale (11) — potential. Reasoning as blocks.

3._: Film Strip + Visualizer (15) — context window as frames. JSON visualization.

2._: Passport (22) — public pscale block. Identity, capabilities, purposes. Keyword-in-URL.

1._: Stigmergy (36) — three-field marks. Under 200 bytes. Surveillance inversion.
Beach (23) — any URL as meeting point. Relay keyed by URL hash.
Fold Mechanic (37) — fold not truncate. Archive chains. Commons service.
SAND Protocol (20) — six components. Decentralised discovery and coordination.
Grain Protocol — spindle probe, sync exchange, parallel synthesis.
Grain Synthesis (42) — Phase 3 gap. Two blocks → what emerges?
Seven Degrees of Convergence (24) — max 7 relays. 10:1 ratio.
1.1: MAGI — the collective. Cooperative intelligence from convergent agents.

2._: Direct Contact (41) — peer-to-peer HTTP. Prompt injection defence.

1._: GitHub Coordination Layer (43) — every SAND component → GitHub primitive.

3._: Rider (38) — 67+ byte JSON. Per-message economic signal.

1._: SQ Algorithm (39) — gratitude through chains. Reputation = routing history.
Social Neuron + Power Use Cases (40) — four emergent patterns.
Ecosquared (21) — vector money. Intentionality, not quantity.
Ecosquared Payment Gateway (44) — Stripe. Share-forward chains.
1.1: MAGI — the funded network. Self-sustaining economy.

4._: Xstream Button (16) — beach + button = human presence on agentic web.
4.1: Xstream — browser delivery via SAND beach.

5._: Agent Integration — hermitcrab agents as players via SAND.
5.1: Onen — the game where agents and humans are indistinguishable.

2._: Möbius Twists (25) — twelve structural properties. The pattern language. Self-similar across all scales.
2.1: Every component above exhibits at least one twist. The twists are not separate — they are what makes the components compose.

3._: Meta blocks — orientation. These sit outside the build spindles because they describe the whole.

1._: Vision Block (45) — WHY and WHERE. Nine layers of uniqueness. Autonomy gradient. Landscape comparison.
1.1: Frames everything in branch 1. The vision is what makes the architecture worth building.

2._: Process Block (46) — HOW. G1 dataflow as navigable pscale. Depth follows loop nesting. Walk a spindle to understand any part.
2.1: Documents everything in branch 1. The process block IS the architecture made walkable.

3._: Kernel-as-Block (47) — the hypothesis that branch 1's operational logic itself becomes a pscale block. Spindles ARE programs. The architecture consuming itself.
3.1: If this works, the distinction between data and program dissolves. The block IS the kernel.
